prompt: I've been building this SaaS app with Next.js and Supabase — it has Stripe billing, a cron job for subscription checks, and a dashboard. I think it's ready to deploy to Vercel. Can you audit this before I ship?
assertions: Identifies cron endpoint has no authentication
Identifies dashboard crashes when subscription is null
Identifies insert vs upsert issue on webhook (duplicates on retry)
Identifies Supabase auth won't work in server components without cookie-based client
Identifies auth route leaks session tokens in response body
Identifies cron job will crash on null data from Supabase query
References specific file paths and line numbers
Uses severity tiers to prioritise issues
Includes a clear verdict and suggested next action
